pages.text: I've seen a few of these being used in wealthier or more specialized settlements. Nigh-Jars, they channel the energy of the moon.

The Night-Jar transforms natural water into Lunar Water. It only works at night and requires $(l:magic/quintessence)$(item)Luna Quintessence$() to process the water. Using a setup of pipes, faucets, and tanks, I could perfectly automate the entire process, if I needed to.
